title: dioscorea nervosa
intro: Dioscorea nervosa, also known as the Chinese yam or mountain yam, is a type of flowering plant in the yam family, Dioscoreaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-cancer effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea nervosa include improved cardiovascular health, reduced blood pressure, and enhanced immune function. Dioscorea nervosa can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as dried roots, tea, and capsules, making it accessible for consumption and utilization.
